customrecordtype.description: Maps Amazon settlement/order column names to NetSuite items. Used for settlement journal entries and optionally for order line items.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Amazon Column Name
customrecordcustomfield.description: Column name from Amazon data (e.g., product sales tax, shipping credits, fba fees)

customrecordcustomfield.label: NetSuite Item
customrecordcustomfield.description: NetSuite item to use when this column appears in Amazon data

customrecordcustomfield.label: Use in Orders
customrecordcustomfield.description: Use this column-item mapping when creating Sales Orders/Cash Sales

customrecordcustomfield.label: Use in Settlements
customrecordcustomfield.description: Use this column-item mapping when processing settlement reports and creating journal entries
